title: symphyotrichum × tardiflorum
intro: Symphyotrichum × tardiflorum, also known as the tall boneset or white boneset, is a perennial flowering plant in the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids and other bioactive compounds, which may provide various health benefits, including antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. The herbal preparations of Symphyotrichum × tardiflorum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to relieve respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
